title: cyperus juncelliformis
intro: Cyperus juncelliformis, also known as the yellow papyrus sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus juncelliformis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or added to capsules for oral consumption.
